title: Golden Globes 2026 Winners: Supporting Actor Categories
text: The 2026 Golden Globes ceremony, held January 11 and hosted by Nikki Glaser, celebrated achievements across film and television with several standout winners in supporting roles. In the motion picture supporting actor category, Stellan Skarsgård won for his performance in Sentimental Value, competing against notable nominees including Benicio Del Toro and Sean Penn from One Battle After Another. In motion picture supporting actress, Teyana Taylor claimed victory for One Battle After Another, triumphing over competitors including Emily Blunt and Ariana Grande. In television supporting actor, Owen Cooper earned the prize for his work in Adolescence, which emerged as a major winner throughout the evening. In television supporting actress, Erin Doherty also won for Adolescence, contributing to the limited series impressive showing at the ceremony. The article notes that One Battle After Another demonstrated remarkable strength across multiple categories, sweeping numerous awards including Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy and Best Director for Paul Thomas Anderson. The ceremony featured an internationally diverse slate of nominees, with international films gaining significant recognition.
